commit_message:
Add CBOR transactors for UART, I2C, JTAG, SPI and SWD Add CBOR transactors for UART, I2C, JTAG, SPI and SWD ### I2C, SPI, JTAG, SWD, UART transactors

This merge request adds new transactor implementations for I2C, SPI, JTAG, SWD and UART. It introduces new command and response formats for the transactors based in [CBOR](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc8949)-encoded payloads. The descriptions of the encoded command and responses are in the `cbor_transactor` packages of each protocol library.

examples.patch:
@@ -19,7 +19,7 @@ package body udp_socket is
 
   attribute foreign of udp_socket_sendto: procedure is "VHPIDIRECT udp_socket-vhpidirect.so udp_socket_sendto";
 
-  function udp_socket_recv_len(socket: udp_socket_t) return integer
+  impure function udp_socket_recv_len(socket: udp_socket_t) return integer
   is
   begin
     assert false report "Should not be called" severity failure;
